titleStmt.title: SII 16.153: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 153. (A.R. No. 348 of 1905.) DĒVIGUḌI, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up close to the main gōpura of the Taḷakaṇṭamma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Nija-Āshāḍha ba • • ., corresponding to 1546 A.D., July, the other details being lost.

It records a gift of the village Turaṅgāyapalle, in Mulki-sīma to Kandāḷa Apanāchārya by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Māḍrāju China Timmayyadēva-mahārāju who held the territory of Mulki-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1468
parābhavasaṁvatsaraṁ nijaĀṣāḍha ba
matē rāmānujāyanamaḥ śrīmadvēdamārgapratiṣṭhāpanācā
ryulayina vēdāṁtācāryulayina kaṁdāḷa [A*]panācāryulayya
manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivarāyamahārāyalu
pṛthvīrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara māṁḍrāju cinatimmaya
dēvamahārājulu Anaṁtamulayina daṁḍālu samarpiṁciyiccina bhūdānaśāsanaṁ
sadāśivarāyalu pāliṁcina mulkiśīmalōni grāmaṁ turaṁgāyapalle dhārāpūrvva
kaṁgānu samarpiṁśtimi Āgrāmānanu kaligina nidhinikṣēpaṇa jalapāṣāṇaAkṣiĀgāmi
śiddhasādhyaṁbayina Aṣṭabhōgatēja svāmyāluN lōnugānu Ācaṁdrārkkastāyigānu
Anubhaviṁcēdi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁjēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 16.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
